name: AFWERX / SpaceWERX 26.1 SBIR/STTR
summary: AFWERX is the DAF innovation arm within AFRL: SBIR/STTR, Spark, SpaceWERX. ~1,400 SBIR/STTR awards/yr, ~$1.4B; 26.1 Phase I closed March 6, 2026. Director Col. Nathan Stuckey.
killinchu_fit: Killinchu fits the edge-inference + governance overlay + air-gap deployment lane: UDS/Zarf airgap delivery + Lambda-axis governance + RAG-bias mitigation. SBIR Phase I -> STRATFI/TACFI on-ramp.
hooks: Air-gap deployment via UDS Zarf bundle (recipe-airgap-mode)
Lambda-axis governance overlay on field-updatable edge models
Agentic-AI doctrine with auditable receipts for AFWERX Autonomy Prime
